CustomField.description: JSON object mapping inbound event-type values to handler-class names. Each handler implements IWebhookEventHandler. Example: {"charge.succeeded":"DeliveryStripePaymentHandler","payment_intent.succeeded":"DeliveryStripePaymentHandler"}. Handler names resolve with and without the package namespace prefix.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: JSON map of event_type -> IWebhookEventHandler class name.
CustomField.label: Routing Rules JSON
